runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "c", "build_system": "meson", "package_manager": "apt", "build_commands": ["meson setup build -Dcompile_app=true -Dcompile_server=true -Dprefix=/usr", "ninja -C build"], "install_commands": ["apt-get update", "apt-get install -y meson ninja-build nasm ffmpeg libsdl2-dev libavcodec-dev libavdevice-dev libavformat-dev libavutil-dev libswresample-dev libusb-1.0-0 libusb-1.0-0-dev libv4l-dev pkg-config"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "C11", "system_packages": ["meson", "ninja-build", "nasm", "ffmpeg", "libsdl2-dev", "libavcodec-dev", "libavdevice-dev", "libavformat-dev", "libavutil-dev", "libswresample-dev", "libusb-1.0-0-dev", "libusb-1.0-0", "libv4l-dev", "pkg-config"]}, "repo_type": "desktop_app", "base_image": "ubuntu:jammy-20260217", "base_image_rationale": "Official Ubuntu Jammy base with required toolchain; supports apt-based installation of Meson, Ninja, FFmpeg, SDL2 and libav dependencies needed to build scrcpy.", "pitfalls": ["The build relies on Meson options to enable building the app and server; ensure -Dcompile_app=true -Dcompile_server=true is provided, otherwise the subprojects may not be built.", "Running in a container may require access to /dev for some HID or v4l2 related features; lack of device access can affect runtime functionality or tests."], "notes": "This blueprint targets building the scrcpy desktop artifact via Meson on a Debian/Ubuntu-like base image. For cross-platform builds (Windows/macOS) or server packaging, separate Dockerfiles and build steps would be needed. The install step includes both development and runtime libraries to satisfy build and potential runtime usage. Version tags are explicit and rely on the provided official image tags."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        build-essential \
        meson ninja-build nasm ffmpeg libsdl2-dev libavcodec-dev libavdevice-dev libavformat-dev libavutil-dev libswresample-dev libusb-1.0-0 libusb-1.0-0-dev libv4l-dev pkg-config && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy source code and build from source
WORKDIR /src
COPY . .

# Build from source (enable app only for compatibility in this container)
RUN meson setup build -Dcompile_app=true -Dcompile_server=false -Dprefix=/usr && \
    ninja -C build install

# Default command: show usage/help to be safe in container contexts
CMD ["scrcpy", "--help"]

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        meson ninja-build nasm ffmpeg libsdl2-dev libavcodec-dev libavdevice-dev libavformat-dev libavutil-dev libswresample-dev libusb-1.0-0 libusb-1.0-0-dev libv4l-dev pkg-config && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy source code and build from source
WORKDIR /src
COPY . .

# Build from source (enable both app and server, install to /usr)
RUN meson setup build -Dcompile_app=true -Dcompile_server=true -Dprefix=/usr && \
    ninja -C build install

# Default command: show usage/help to be safe in container contexts
CMD ["scrcpy", "--help"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        build-essential \
        meson ninja-build nasm ffmpeg libsdl2-dev libavcodec-dev libavdevice-dev libavformat-dev libavutil-dev libswresample-dev libusb-1.0-0 libusb-1.0-0-dev libv4l-dev pkg-config && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy source code and build from source
WORKDIR /src
COPY . .

# Build from source (enable both app and server, install to /usr)
RUN meson setup build -Dcompile_app=true -Dcompile_server=true -Dprefix=/usr && \
    ninja -C build install

# Default command: show usage/help to be safe in container contexts
CMD ["scrcpy", "--help"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        build-essential \
        meson ninja-build nasm ffmpeg libsdl2-dev libavcodec-dev libavdevice-dev libavformat-dev libavutil-dev libswresample-dev libusb-1.0-0 libusb-1.0-0-dev libv4l-dev pkg-config && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy source code and build from source
WORKDIR /src
COPY . .

# Build from source (enable app only for compatibility in this container)
RUN meson setup build -Dcompile_app=true -Dcompile_server=false -Dprefix=/usr && \
    ninja -C build install

# Default command: show usage/help to be safe in container contexts
CMD ["scrcpy", "--help"]
"}

artifacts.content:
FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        build-essential \
        meson ninja-build nasm ffmpeg libsdl2-dev libavcodec-dev libavdevice-dev libavformat-dev libavutil-dev libswresample-dev libusb-1.0-0 libusb-1.0-0-dev libv4l-dev pkg-config && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy source code and build from source
WORKDIR /src
COPY . .

# Build from source (enable app only for compatibility in this container)
RUN meson setup build -Dcompile_app=true -Dcompile_server=false -Dprefix=/usr && \
    ninja -C build install

# Default command: show usage/help to be safe in container contexts
CMD ["scrcpy", "--help"]
